name: Portugese Red Bean Soup (the Reefs, Southampt
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all vegetables finely, including tomatoes and potato.
2. Drain soaked beans, discarding the liquid.
3. In a medium pot, heat olive oil and butter until hot.
4. Add chopped carrot, onion, celery, and tomatoes; sauté without browning.
5. Add chopped potato, paprika, and chicken stock. Bring to a boil.
6. Add kidney beans and reduce heat to a simmer.
7. Stir in tomato paste. Cook for 45-60 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. When beans are soft, add sausage and cayenne pepper. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
